name: OUROBOROS
author: qmystic

placementContext.reason: Ouroboros is the grand finale of CherryTeam projects, aiming to be harder than current legends like VSC and Abyss of Darkness through extreme mechanical density.

description: A punishing and visually dense grand finale to the CherryTeam saga, Ouroboros features some of the most difficult and complex mechanical segments ever conceived in Geometry Dash.
